prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Call of Cthulhu / 1920s Lovecraftian inspired cosmic horror atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent surrounded by cold dark ocean, New England coastline, Arkham town streets, Miskatonic river delta, fog-shrouded rocky hills, old colonial architecture, lighthouse coast, Miskatonic University expedition routes, forbidden standing stones, cult-haunted villages, marshlands, old rail lines and hidden ruins beneath ordinary 1920s settlements.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated 1920s investigative atlas, aged parchment with hand annotations, sepia ink, damp fog, creeping cosmic dread, subtle impossible geometry, Lovecraftian horror mood without showing monsters directly.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding seas and small offshore fragments; include compass rose, hand-drawn border, rail/trail routes, lighthouse icons, standing stone symbols, river-delta detail and investigator annotations without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, fjords, capes, deltas, salt marshes, foggy estuaries and varied landforms; include rocky coasts, dark forests, rural farmlands, mountains, wetlands, cold islands, moors and uncanny wastelands.
Avoid: heroic fantasy, visible tentacle monster centerpiece, modern satellite image, clean tourist map, simple oval continent, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
